station.name: Quinsigamond River at North Grafton, MA
station.note: The public USGS live monitor is downstream of Lake Quinsigamond and is best treated as river outlet context, not an in-lake buoy.

sources.label: Worcester 2024 Lake Quinsigamond Report
sources.role: Documents the in-lake continuous monitoring buoys, beach closures, and 2024 water-quality results.

sources.label: Worcester Lakes & Ponds Program
sources.role: City lake monitoring, WCMC, closure alerts, and annual State of the Lakes reporting.

sources.label: NexSens WQData LIVE
sources.role: Candidate platform for public buoy dashboards and API access if Worcester exposes the project.

sources.label: USGS Water Services
sources.role: Live gage height, discharge, and daily discharge history at the downstream outlet station.

sources.label: USGS OGC Field Measurements
sources.role: Approved manual field measurements at USGS-01110000.

sources.label: Water Quality Portal
sources.role: Historical sample data for temperature, turbidity, nutrients, oxygen, and conductivity.

sources.label: Open-Meteo
sources.role: Current, forecast, and historical weather near the lake.
